Info.ToolboxConfigModel:
{"entries":[{"content":{"appGalleryLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_c1f5523c-f9ef-4d23-96ee-54c9d496b95a","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxAppGalleryFiles_c1f5523c-f9ef-4d23-96ee-54c9d496b95a"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"a6d7eac2-602d-489f-8e7d-b8f5422edc55"},"authorEmail":"vhtmfu@outlook.com","authorName":"埃博拉酱","authorOrganization":"一致行动党","description":"使用模型上下文协议 (MCP) 将 MATLAB 集成到智能体 AI 工作流中。MATLAB MCP Core Server 标准化智能体 AI 应用（Claude Desktop®、Visual Studio Code®、Gemini CLI®）与 MATLAB 之间的连接，从而实现代码执行、调试和自动化。使用五个内置工具驱动与 MATLAB 的交互，从而消除手动复制和粘贴的需要：

check_matlab_code
evaluate_matlab_code
run_matlab_file
run_matlab_test_file
detect_matlab_toolboxes","gettingStartedGuideLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_c1f5523c-f9ef-4d23-96ee-54c9d496b95a","labelID":"Deployment_GettingStartedGuideFile_c1f5523c-f9ef-4d23-96ee-54c9d496b95a"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"b7dd06ff-0a1b-459d-8b7b-0e6050d4a7eb"},"maxRelease":"R2026a","minRelease":"R2020b","outputFileName":"MATLAB MCP Core Server.mltbx","outputFolder":"/","summary":"在智能体 AI 工作流中集成 MATLAB。可以将你已经启动的当前MATLAB会话连接到智能体。","supportedPlatforms":["Windows","Linux","Mac","MatlabOnline"],"toolboxFolder":"/","toolboxImgLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_c1f5523c-f9ef-4d23-96ee-54c9d496b95a","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxImageFile_c1f5523c-f9ef-4d23-96ee-54c9d496b95a"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"e52872e0-2c2a-4cfe-a22e-8d319573e238"},"toolboxName":"MATLAB MCP Core Server","toolboxVersion":"0.6.1","uniqueId":"eab545d5-dcd3-4f0c-93ed-238cd5dc9aba"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ToolboxConfiguration","uuid":"aa053308-79a4-4c50-92e4-c89edc8c3b25"},{"content":{},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectStateValidationIssueList","uuid":"312c0ea3-995d-4c09-bfdd-3faca8c903fb"}],"packageUris":["http://schema.mathworks.com/mf0/deployment_toolbox_model/1.0.0"],"version":"1.0"}
